fields.summary: Change types of related entities and primary filters in ATSEntity
[Umbrella] Store, manage and serve per-framework application-timeline data

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.
status.name: Resolved

issuetype.description: A problem which impairs or prevents the functions of the product.
issuetype.name: Bug

fields.description:
The current types Map<String, List<String>> relatedEntities and Map<String, Object> primaryFilters have issues.  The List<String> value of the related entities map could have multiple identical strings in it, which doesn't make sense. A more major issue is that we cannot allow primary filter values to be overwritten, because otherwise we will be unable to find those primary filter entries when we want to delete an entity (without doing a nearly full scan).

I propose changing related entities to Map<String, Set<String>> and primary filters to Map<String, Set<Object>>.  The basic methods to add primary filters and related entities are of the form add(key, value) and will not need to change.

resolution.description: A fix for this issue is checked into the tree and tested.
resolution.name: Fixed

fields.summary: Refactoring timeline classes to remove "app" related words

status.description: The issue is considered finished, the resolution is correct. Issues which are not closed can be reopened.
status.name: Closed

fields.summary: TimelineWebServices always passes primary and secondary filters as strings

status.description: The issue is considered finished, the resolution is correct. Issues which are not closed can be reopened.
status.name: Closed
